title: User Profile Page
description: Build the user profile page displaying user information and their photo grid. Show profile header with avatar, username, bio, and follower/following counts. Display user's uploaded photos in a responsive grid layout. Implement edit profile functionality for own profile (update avatar, username, bio). Show follow/unfollow button on other users' profiles. Handle profile not found states. Add navigation between profile tabs if needed (photos, liked photos). Ensure profile is viewable by logged-out users for public profiles.
